subject: Re: Fwd: FW: Agenda
body:
do it

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> fyi
> > From: "John Amerling" <jamerling@viaccess.net>
> To: "Darren Indyke" <dkiesq@aol.com>
> Subject: FW: Agenda
> Date: Tue, 18 Apr 2006 15:15:09 -0400
> 
> Tomorrow we are having a design review meeting
> principally on the office.
> Last week Mr. Epstein pressed me to get moving and
> we are. I have involved
> the Maguire Group in this conversation. They have
> given me a proposal for
> services which is attached. In the interest of
> expediting this entire
> effort, I have indicated that we would pay them for
> their time spent on the
> phone at the rates indicated. The call will settle
> scope. I will then
> develop a budget for the approval of Mr. Epstein
> before another nickel is
> spent. I ask that you forward this message to Mr.
> Epstein to keep him
> abreast of these matters. 
> 
>  
> 
> This has come together quickly, I realize, but I
> believed that he wanted me
> to act immediately. I have been unable to wrap this
> up to this extent and
> get all the parties together until today because
> Friday and Monday were
> holidays here and Monday was a holiday in
> Massachusetts and New Hampshire
> called Patriots day and Douglas Stine went to Paris
> on Saturday and will be
> calling in on the conference call tomorrow from
> Moscow. 
> 
>  
> 
> Please call me if you have any comments or
> questions. 
> 
>  
> 
>   _____  
> 
> From: John Amerling [mailto:jamerling@viaccess.net] 
> Sent: Tuesday, April 18, 2006 3:04 PM
> To: 'dougdstine@aol.com'; 'Barry Kimball'; William
> McComb
> (wfmccomb.eng@attglobal.net)
> Cc: Fran Woods (fwoods@viaccess.net)
> Subject: Agenda
> 
>  
> 
> I plan to use the following agenda for the
> conference call tomorrow at 9 AM
> Eastern time: 
> 
>  
> 
> 1.  Introduction of the Maguire Group Members to
> others on the Design
> Development Team
> 2.  Discussion of Survey Activities Today
> 3.  Open Questions on Office Structure:
> 
> a.       Use of Mosley topo
> 
> b.       Cistern?
> 
> c.       Wastewater?
> 
> d.       Power Source
> 
> 4.  Proposed Scope of Responsibilities of the
> Parties During the Design
> Development Phase for the Office
> 
> a.       McComb: 
> 
>  
> 
> (1)     Permit Application
> 
> (2)     CZM Site Plan
> 
> (3)     Erosion and Sediment Control Plan
> 
>  
> 
> b.       Molyneux: all architectural drawings and
> specifications regarding
> the finishes required for the CZM and Building
> Permits
> 
> c.       Maguire:  all site, civil, structural, and
> MEP required for the
> Building Permit and coordination of all of the
> disciplines
> 
> d.       RR: coordinate efforts of all parties
> 
>  
> 
> 5.  Inventory of Existing Conditions:
> 
>  
> 
> (1)     Electrical Sources, Backup and Distribution
> 
> (2)     Water Sources, Backup and Distribution
> 
> (3)     Wastewater treatment
> 
>  
> 
> 6.  Establishment of Party by Party Task List
> 7.  Look ahead to main house development
> 8.  Establishment of Design Development Team
> Communication and Meeting
> Protocol
> 9.  Establishment of Master Schedule of Activities
> 
>  
> 
> We did do some staking and survey work today. I will
> e mail results when
> available. Please add comments or items which you
> wish to cover. 
> 
>

body_html:
do it

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

fyi

From: "John Amerling" jamerling@viaccess.net
To: "Darren Indyke" dkiesq@aol.com
Subject: FW: Agenda
Date: Tue, 18 Apr 2006 15:15:09 -0400

Tomorrow we are having a design review meeting
principally on the office.
Last week Mr. Epstein pressed me to get moving and
we are. I have involved
the Maguire Group in this conversation. They have
given me a proposal for
services which is attached. In the interest of
expediting this entire
effort, I have indicated that we would pay them for
their time spent on the
phone at the rates indicated. The call will settle
scope. I will then
develop a budget for the approval of Mr. Epstein
before another nickel is
spent. I ask that you forward this message to Mr.
Epstein to keep him
abreast of these matters.

This has come together quickly, I realize, but I
believed that he wanted me
to act immediately. I have been unable to wrap this
up to this extent and
get all the parties together until today because
Friday and Monday were
holidays here and Monday was a holiday in
Massachusetts and New Hampshire
called Patriots day and Douglas Stine went to Paris
on Saturday and will be
calling in on the conference call tomorrow from
Moscow.

Please call me if you have any comments or
questions.

From: John Amerling [mailto:jamerling@viaccess.net]
Sent: Tuesday, April 18, 2006 3:04 PM
To: 'dougdstine@aol.com'; 'Barry Kimball'; William
McComb
(wfmccomb.eng@attglobal.net)
Cc: Fran Woods (fwoods@viaccess.net)
Subject: Agenda

I plan to use the following agenda for the
conference call tomorrow at 9 AM
Eastern time:

  1. Introduction of the Maguire Group Members to
    others on the Design
    Development Team
  2. Discussion of Survey Activities Today
  3. Open Questions on Office Structure:

a. Use of Mosley topo

b. Cistern?

c. Wastewater?

d. Power Source

  1. Proposed Scope of Responsibilities of the
    Parties During the Design
    Development Phase for the Office

a. McComb:

(1) Permit Application

(2) CZM Site Plan

(3) Erosion and Sediment Control Plan

b. Molyneux: all architectural drawings and
specifications regarding
the finishes required for the CZM and Building
Permits

c. Maguire: all site, civil, structural, and
MEP required for the
Building Permit and coordination of all of the
disciplines

d. RR: coordinate efforts of all parties

  1. Inventory of Existing Conditions:

(1) Electrical Sources, Backup and Distribution

(2) Water Sources, Backup and Distribution

(3) Wastewater treatment

  1. Establishment of Party by Party Task List
  2. Look ahead to main house development
  3. Establishment of Design Development Team
    Communication and Meeting
    Protocol
  4. Establishment of Master Schedule of Activities

We did do some staking and survey work today. I will
e mail results when
available. Please add comments or items which you
wish to cover.
